parameters.query:
SELECT
  wn.id, wn.raw_id, wn.slug, wn.name, wn.class_name, wn.category, wn.subtype,
  wn.display_type, wn.manufacturer, wn.size,
  wn.mag_capacity, wn.fire_rate_rpm, wn.ammo_speed_ms,
  wn.ideal_range_m, wn.max_range_m, wn.inventory_scu,
  wn.dmg_energy, wn.dmg_physical, wn.dmg_thermal,
  wn.dmg_distortion, wn.dmg_biochemical, wn.total_damage,
  wn.uex_id, wn.uex_category_name, wn.uex_category_section,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'terminal', t.name, 'buy', p.buy_price, 'sell', p.sell_price
    ) ORDER BY t.name)
    FROM prices p
    JOIN trade_terminals t ON t.id = p.terminal_id
    WHERE p.item_external_id = wn.uex_id
      AND wn.uex_id IS NOT NULL
      AND GREATEST(COALESCE(p.buy_price, 0), COALESCE(p.sell_price, 0)) > 0
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS uex_prices,

  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'shop', si.shop, 'location', si.location,
      'buy', si.buy_auec, 'sell', si.sell_auec
    ) ORDER BY si.shop)
    FROM datap4k_shop_inventory si
    WHERE si.item_raw_id = wn.raw_id
      AND si.item_raw_table = 'datap4k_weapons_raw'
      AND GREATEST(COALESCE(si.buy_auec, 0), COALESCE(si.sell_auec, 0)) > 0
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS datap4k_prices

FROM datap4k_weapons_norm wn
WHERE wn.id = {{$json["id"]}};
